arts.ttl: Barcelona vs Real Mallorca – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Barcelona can extend their advantage in La Liga to seven points with a win over Real Mallorca this evening. Hansi Flick’s side won a dramatic seven-goal thriller with Celta Vigo at the weekend, as Raphinha’s 98th-minute penalty sealed a 4-3 win.
